title: ammannia schinzii subsp. subalata
intro: Ammannia schinzii subsp. subalata is a plant species commonly known as bushy ammannia or bush ammannia. It is traditionally used in South African folk medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ammannia schinzii subsp. subalata include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. The plant's herbal preparations often involve making a tea from its leaves or roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
